answer_en:
Levator Ani m. (Iliococcygeus, Pubococcygeus, and Puborectalis mm.)
Origin: Body of pubis, tendinous arch of levator ani, and ischial spine
Insertion: Coccyx, anococcygeal ligament, perineal body, and walls of the prostate/vagina, rectum, and anal canal
